page_metadata.biotools__summary: Estimates gene-specific phenotypes from off-target confounded RNAi screens. The phenotype of each siRNA is modeled based on on-targeted and off-targeted genes, using a regularized linear regression model.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Estimates gene-specific phenotypes from off-target confounded RNAi screens. The phenotype of each siRNA is modeled based on on-targeted and off-targeted genes, using a regularized linear regression model.
